title: Russia's Early Space Program! #space #nasa #history
summary: A brief discussion of the unconventional philosophical and occult influences behind early Russian and American space programs, focusing on Konstantin Tsiolkovsky's cosmic philosophy and Jack Parsons' involvement with occult practices.

key_claims.claim: Konstantin Tsiolkovsky constructed his own cosmic religion or worldview around space that included beliefs in human colonization of the Milky Way, immortality, regulating forces of nature, and time travel
Jack Parsons was part of the Pasadena OTO cult along with L. Ron Hubbard
Jack Parsons and L. Ron Hubbard performed sex magic rituals together
Jack Parsons received a past life regression in which he believed he was Simon Magus, a biblical character who used black magic to levitate
